description: The Northern Ireland Executive is the administrative branch of the Northern Ireland Assembly, the devolved legislature for Northern Ireland. It is responsible for matters including enterprise, trade and investment, agriculture and rural development, education, health, policing and justice, environment and regional development. Northern Ireland Executive is a devolved government, supported by 10 agencies and public bodies .

details.body:
The Northern Ireland Executive is the administrative branch of the Northern Ireland Assembly, the devolved legislature for Northern Ireland. It is responsible for matters including enterprise, trade and investment, agriculture and rural development, education, health, policing and justice, environment and regional development.

Northern Ireland Executive is a devolved government, supported by 10 agencies and public bodies.

The Head of the Northern Ireland Civil Service (NICS) serves the devolved administration of Northern Ireland.

The Head of NICS is responsible for:

  • the Northern Ireland Executive’s programme for government
  • chairing the cross-government permanent secretary group
  • policy advice to the First Minister and Deputy First Minister of Northern Ireland
